opportunities.specific_product: upholstered dorm headboard cushion (fits behind bed frame)
opportunities.transformation_hook: $39 dorm bed glow-up before move-in day
opportunities.before_state: bare metal dorm bed frame against cinderblock walls, no headboard, dorm-issue mattress exposed
opportunities.after_state: plush upholstered headboard, styled bedding, and a cozy study-ready dorm nook
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's Pinterest feed is currently saturated with dorm move-in pins (headboards, curtains, mirrors) and late July is peak back-to-school shopping before August semester start.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $52 couch fix hides pet hair and stains overnight
opportunities.before_state: worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch dragging down the whole living room
opportunities.after_state: crisp, tailored-looking sofa that reads brand new
buyer_intent_keywords: cheap way to update old couch
opportunities.why_now: Living-room layout and refresh content is actively trending across Martha Stewart and HGTV pins, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the highest-margin pick even though demand is steady rather than spiking.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 tile stickers turn a boring bathroom bold in an afternoon
opportunities.before_state: plain builder-grade white tile bathroom that looks dated
opportunities.after_state: bold graphic-pattern statement tile wall or floor, no demo required
opportunities.why_now: BHG's design desk just flagged bold, graphic bathroom tile as 'having a major moment,' and renters/DIYers are searching for damage-free ways to get the look.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 gold mirror upgrade makes any entryway look designer
opportunities.before_state: bare, cluttered entryway wall or plain dorm desk with no mirror
opportunities.after_state: polished gold-accented mirror moment that anchors the whole space
opportunities.why_now: HGTV is pushing 'entryway staples' content (mirrors, lighting, storage) at the same moment Apartment Therapy's dorm pins are driving vanity-mirror searches for move-in season.

opportunities.specific_product: stackable clear kitchen cabinet/pantry organizer bins
opportunities.transformation_hook: $24 organizers turn a chaotic cabinet into a magazine kitchen
opportunities.before_state: jumbled, overstuffed kitchen cabinet or pantry shelf with nothing visible
opportunities.after_state: neat, labeled, stackable clear bins with everything in its place
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's latest pin specifically calls out decluttering kitchen items you don't need, signaling organization-format content is resonating with their audience right now.
